# Design

This fixture intentionally has no `design/reference/` directory and no images
anywhere so `design-preflight --strict` blocks on the `visual-references` check.

## Design system
- Brand: test fixture
- Typography: system-ui
- Color palette: neutral grays

## Shape brief
- Surface: dashboard
- User goal: prove strict mode enforces visual-references honestly
- Constraints: no images in this fixture
- Direction: deliberate gap

## Tokens
- `--color-primary: #1f2933`
- `--space-4: 16px`
- `--radius-md: 8px`
- `--font-display: serif`
